description: A watercolor painting of a sunlit street in Marrakech, Morocco. Robed figures walk along a wide street leading toward an ornate gateway with a horseshoe arch set in tall pink-red city walls. Small minarets or towers rise above the walls. A woman at the right carries a large vessel on her head. The colors are warm — pinks, sandy beiges, soft blues — with bright sunlight casting strong shadows. Birds (possibly storks) perch atop the walls. The atmosphere is warm and airy.
